title: Implement native TUI connection picker flow
description: The py4c.1.10 snapshot Bead can cover disconnected/transport state, but the native TUI does not yet have a real connection picker screen for selecting Demo, BLE, or IP/CoAP endpoints. Add a no-hardware connection picker flow backed by fakes, then add terminal snapshot coverage for it.
notes:
Implementation evidence for native TUI connection picker flow:
- Added native TUI Link picker bound to l, rendering Demo, BLE, and IP/CoAP choices in ActivePane and command bar.
- Added connection_factory wiring so CLI-provided BLE/IP endpoints can be selected after startup; Demo selection drops back to no transport.
- Added staged transport switching: candidate BLE/IP clients connect before the existing transport is torn down; unavailable or failed candidates render a recoverable connection error and preserve the current client.
- Added rollback/cleanup behavior for failed candidate connect, failed old-client disconnect, live Observe/log task cancellation during successful switches, and best-effort unmount cleanup.
- Added terminal snapshot coverage for the picker and no-hardware fake-backed tests for BLE selection, unavailable transports, failed connect rollback, cleanup failure handling, live observe cancellation/retention, Demo selection, and main() picker factory wiring.

Validation:
- cd python && uv run pytest tests/tui/test_native.py -q -> 45 passed in 11.35s.
- cd python && uv run pytest tests/tui/test_native.py tests/client/test_lci.py tests/client/test_packet_coap.py -q -> 69 passed in 11.35s.
- cd python && uv run ruff check src/lichen/tui/native.py tests/tui/test_native.py -> passed.
- git diff --check -> passed.
- No EC2 used; this was Python-only no-hardware TUI work.

Code review:
- Initial/follow-up reviews found P1/P2 issues: main() did not pass connection_factory; switching did not cancel observe/log tasks; unavailable factories tore down the current client; BLE selection test did not prove new client data path; unavailable errors were invisible outside Chats; connect-time replacement failure could strand the current transport; candidate cleanup/old disconnect failures could mask rollback; connection error paths left hidden Connect prompt state active; unmount could skip disconnect after task cleanup failure; failed old disconnect could cancel live subscriptions; observe cleanup failure could skip log cleanup.
- All P1/P2 findings were fixed with regression tests.
- Final review by Parfit: no P0/P1/P2 findings; relied on passing gates.
- Final review by Copernicus: no P0/P1/P2 findings; independently ran cd python && uv run pytest tests/tui/test_native.py -q -> 45 passed.
- Final review by Chandrasekhar: no P0/P1/P2 findings; independently ran cd python && uv run pytest tests/tui/test_native.py -q -> 45 passed.
close_reason: Completed native no-hardware TUI connection picker with fake-backed tests, terminal snapshot coverage, staged transport rollback, passing gates, and three clean final code reviews.
